install.ctaAriaIos: Show me how to add {{engineName}} to my home screen

fallback.desktopSafariFirefox: Add {{engineName}} to your home screen for one-tap access. Use your browser's bookmarking option to keep it accessible. No app store needed — it's free.
fallback.unknown: {{engineName}} works on any device. Use your browser's "Add to home screen" option to keep it accessible.

banner.default: Add {{engineName}} to your home screen for one-tap access. No app store, no signup.

ahtsCard.title: Add {{engineName}} to your home screen
ahtsCard.body: Install for one-tap access — opens like any other app. No app store needed.

overlay.title: Add {{engineName}} to your home screen
overlay.body: Three taps in Safari. After this, {{engineName}} opens like any other app.
overlay.step1: Tap the share button at the bottom of Safari.
overlay.step2: Scroll down and tap Add to Home Screen.
overlay.step3: Tap Add in the top right corner.
overlay.ariaLabel: How to add {{engineName}} to your home screen

install.installedToast: {{engineName}} is on your home screen. Open it like any other app.

firstVisit.default: First visit? Try it out — your data stays on your device.
